title: potentilla leschenaultiana var. bannehalensis
intro: Potentilla leschenaultiana var. bannehalensis, also known as the Himalayan potentilla, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Potentilla plant, a flowering shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
